message:
Command `
# Confirm: OpenROAD is in compute-heavy phase. LibreLane sleeping waiting for OpenROAD output.
# This is normal. Log will update when OpenROAD prints next message.
# Check drt_resume.log for any additional context
head -20 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
echo "..."
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log
` executed with exit code 0.
